title: Review Media Engine and Rinseables architecture readiness
summary: Run the architecture-first review model against Media Engine and Rinseables and generate missing documentation, workflows, dashboards, schemas, approvals, and improvement roadmaps.
acceptanceCriteria: Media Engine review covers publishing, coverage mix, brand growth, platform coverage, and approval time
Rinseables review covers business model, workflows, dashboards, approvals, and agent boundaries
Missing project documents are listed for each project
Priority roadmaps are generated for both projects
